description: Negative logging fixture. The fixture's `event.mysqlErrorCode` carries a SQL boundary keyword. The Todo 10 validator runs formatDiagnostic against it and must emit LOGGING NOT READY: SQL_LEAK with exit 1. Demonstrates that any SQL boundary keyword (SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/CREATE/ALTER/DROP/TRUNCATE/RENAME/GRANT/REVOKE/REPLACE) is rejected even when it appears in a value the caller intended as a benign label.
